General.Name: Bayan Mining and Minerals Ltd
General.Description: Bayan Mining and Minerals Limited, a mineral exploration company, engages in the exploration of EV metals in North America. The company explores for silver, gold, and lithium deposits. It holds 100% interests in the Bayan Springs projects located in Nevada; Desert Star projects located in California; Pepita Gold project located in Brazil; Arrel Lithium project, located in Ontario, Canada; and Gorge Lithium project and Tango Lithium project in Canada. The company was formerly known as Balkan Mining and Minerals Limited and changed its name to Bayan Mining and Minerals Limited in December 2024. Bayan Mining and Minerals Limited was incorporated in 2020 and is based in Perth, Australia.

4.Name: Ms. Melanie Jane Ross A.C.I.S., AGIA, B.Com., C.A.
4.Title: Joint Company Secretary
